name: Basket Margin
summary: Returns the basket margin for a set of orders. A POST call (jData + jKey) that computes the total margin used and the margin used after the trade for a primary order plus an optional array (basketlists) of additional order objects.

request_params.name: jData*
request_params.description: Should send json object with fields in below list.

json_fields.name: uid
json_fields.description: Logged in User Id

json_fields.name: actid
json_fields.description: Login users account ID

json_fields.name: exch
json_fields.description: Exchange (Select from 'exarr' Array provided in User Details response)

json_fields.name: tsym
json_fields.description: Unique id of contract on which order to be placed. (use url encoding to avoid special char error for symbols like M&M)

json_fields.name: qty
json_fields.description: Order Quantity [If qty is junk value other than numbers].

json_fields.name: prc
json_fields.description: Order Price [If prc is junk value other than numbers] "Order price cannot be zero".

json_fields.name: trgprc
json_fields.description: Only to be sent in case of SL / SL-M order.

json_fields.name: prd
json_fields.description: Product name (Select from 'prarr' Array provided in User Details response, and if same is allowed for selected, exchange. Show product display name, for user to select, and send corresponding prd in API call)

json_fields.name: trantype
json_fields.description: B -> BUY, S -> SELL [transtype should be 'B' or 'S' else reject].

json_fields.name: prctyp
json_fields.description: Order price type.

json_fields.name: blprc
json_fields.description: Book loss Price applicable only if product is selected as H and B (High Leverage and Bracket order)

json_fields.name: rorgqty
json_fields.description: Optional field. Application only for modify order, open order quantity

json_fields.name: fillshares
json_fields.description: Optional field. Application only for modify order, quantity already filled.

json_fields.name: rorgprc
json_fields.description: Optional field. Application only for modify order, open order price

json_fields.name: orgtrgprc
json_fields.description: Optional field. Application only for modify order, open order trigger price

json_fields.name: norenordno
json_fields.description: Optional field. Application only for H or B order modification

json_fields.name: snonum
json_fields.description: Optional field. Application only for H or B order modification

json_fields.name: basketlists
json_fields.description: Optional field. Array of json objects. (object fields given in below table)

json_fields.name: basketlists[].exch
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Exchange (Select from 'exarr' Array provided in User Details response)

json_fields.name: basketlists[].tsym
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Unique id of contract on which order to be placed. (use url encoding to avoid special char error for symbols like M&M)

json_fields.name: basketlists[].qty
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Order Quantity [If qty is junk value other than numbers].

json_fields.name: basketlists[].prc
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Order Price [If prc is junk value other than numbers] "Order price cannot be zero".

json_fields.name: basketlists[].trgprc
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Only to be sent in case of SL / SL-M order.

json_fields.name: basketlists[].prd
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Product name (Select from 'prarr' Array provided in User Details response, and if same is allowed for selected, exchange. Show product display name, for user to select, and send corresponding prd in API call)

json_fields.name: basketlists[].trantype
json_fields.description: (Array object field) B -> BUY, S -> SELL [transtype should be 'B' or 'S' else reject].

json_fields.name: basketlists[].prctyp
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Order price type.

json_fields.name: basketlists[].introp_key
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Optional field.

json_fields.name: basketlists[].introp_exch
json_fields.description: (Array object field) Optional field.

response_fields.name: stat
response_fields.description: Place order success or failure indication.

response_fields.name: remarks
response_fields.description: This field will contain rejection reason.

response_fields.name: emsg
response_fields.description: This will be present only if Order placement fails

notes: Request is sent as jData (a JSON object) plus jKey, Content-Type application/json. Base URL in production is https://piconnect.flattrade.in/PiConnectAPI (the curl sample uses a 'BaseURL' placeholder). url-encode symbols containing special characters such as M&M to avoid errors. 'blprc' (Book loss Price) applies only when product = H and B (High Leverage and Bracket order). The fields rorgqty, fillshares, rorgprc, orgtrgprc are only for modify-order use; norenordno/snonum apply only for H or B order modification. 'basketlists' is an optional array of additional order objects (each with its own exch/tsym/qty/prc/trgprc/prd/trantype/prctyp plus optional introp_key/introp_exch). No sample success/failure JSON response body is shown in the doc; only the response field table is provided. prctyp possible values are LMT / SL-LMT (no market order type listed, consistent with Flattrade's limit/SL-limit-only constraint).
issues: No sample success/failure JSON response body is present in the source for this section (only the response field table and the request curl), so sample_success_response and sample_failure_response are left empty. The doc table's possible-value column for 'exch' visually spans rows as 'NSE / NFO / BSE / MCX' (the cleaned text flattens it); bound via the page images. The top fragment of page 15 (marginused/emsg rows) belongs to the PRECEDING section (prior order endpoint) and was excluded. Field requiredness inferred from trailing '*' in the doc; trgprc/blprc/rorgqty/fillshares/rorgprc/orgtrgprc/norenordno/snonum/basketlists and introp_key/introp_exch shown without '*' (optional).
